description: Monorepo that builds Zod schemas from GraphQL typed documents: runtime @vantreeseba/graphql-zod (inferZodSchema) plus graphql-codegen plugin @vantreeseba/graphql-zod-codegen.
rules: npm-workspaces monorepo: packages/graphql-zod is the runtime; packages/graphql-zod-codegen is the graphql-codegen plugin.
ESM only ("type": "module") and TypeScript 5 strict mode; import paths use the .js extension.
graphql (>=16) and zod (>=3) are peer dependencies, not bundled.
Runtime public API (from packages/graphql-zod/src/index.ts): inferZodSchema, numericString, and the shared codegen building blocks defaultScalarCodeMap / resolveTypeInfo / VariableInfo.
Codegen public API (from packages/graphql-zod-codegen/src/index.ts): the graphql-codegen plugin; its generated output imports numericString from @vantreeseba/graphql-zod.
Nullable GraphQL fields map to .nullish(); list fields map to .array().
Non-null String/ID fields get .min(1), except fields named 'id'.
User scalar overrides merge over the default scalar map (user wins); user field overrides replace generated types wholesale.
Unknown/unmapped types fall back to z.any() and emit a console.warn instead of throwing.
Nested input object types and enums are not yet resolved (fall back to z.any() / z.string()); result schemas are codegen-only — see TODO.md.
